scripts.dev:callback: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile runtime --profile callback up --build
scripts.dev:ops: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile runtime --profile callback --profile ops up --build
scripts.test: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_API_KEY= -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_API_KEY= api pytest
scripts.test:contract: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_API_KEY= -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_API_KEY= api pytest tests/contract
scripts.test:api: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_API_KEY= -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_API_KEY= api pytest tests/api
scripts.test:domain: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_API_KEY= -e MAGICK_CLOUD_OPENAI_COMPATIBLE_API_KEY= api pytest tests/domain
scripts.check:fast: pnpm run test:contract && pnpm run test:domain
scripts.check:seam: pnpm run test:api && pnpm run check:perimeter
scripts.lint: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm api ruff check . && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm api mypy app
scripts.seed:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm api python -m app.dev.seed_runtime --site-id site_smoke --key-id key_default --secret magick-cloud-test-secret
